creator: duerrd561@gmail.com
text: I'm having the same reset controller issue on 11.2-RELEASE with an SM961.  I tried it on 2 different SuperMicro systems: one very new system with a mobo-based m.2 slot, and one older system with a PCIe m.2 adapter.  Let me know if I can be of assistance with troubleshooting.  Would really love to be able to use this hardware.
